description: Pluggable research-mode slot for market sizing, competitive teardown, and interview synthesis workflows.

fields.name: promptSource
fields.description: Relative path to the Markdown prompt source that drives this research mode.

fields.name: researchMode
fields.description: How aggressively the agent should browse, triangulate, and validate evidence.

fields.name: outputMode
fields.description: The expected output shape, such as one-pager, teardown, or investment memo.

fields.name: sourceTypes
fields.description: Preferred source categories for market, competition, and interview-backed research.

fields.name: researchDimensions
fields.description: The evidence dimensions the agent should explicitly research.

fields.name: specialists
fields.description: Named specialist lanes that shape the research workflow.

fields.name: deliverables
fields.description: Artifacts the agent should produce before making a verdict.

fields.name: scoringAxes
fields.description: Criteria used to score whether the idea deserves to exist.

fields.name: scoreScale
fields.description: Human-readable score scale, such as 0-10 or low/medium/high.
